DocumentationTemplate.Html: <!doctype html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8" /> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" /> <title>{{title}}</title> <style> {{css}} </style> </head> <body> {{navigation}} {{content}} {{script}} </body> </html>
DocumentationTemplate.Name: metametabi-static-shell
